title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 143.998 - Tax return to contain number assigned by director to school district
text:
143.998.  Tax return to contain number assigned by director to school district. — Every person filing an individual income tax return form under this chapter shall place in the space provided on said form the number assigned by the department of revenue to the school district of which the person filing is a resident.
(L. 1977 H.B. 131 § 2)
